info.english_meaning: to satisfy to please to force
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 5.14 spf ityatra 'smf ityeke' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti
